text: Alif, Lām, Meem.
tl: Alif-Laaam-Meeem

text: The Byzantines have been defeated
tl: Ghulibatir Room

text: In the nearest land. But they, after their defeat, will overcome
tl: Feee adnal ardi Wa-hum mim ba'di ghalabihim sa-yaghliboon

text: Within three to nine years. To Allāh belongs the command [i.e., decree] before and after. And that day the believers will rejoice
tl: Fee bid'i sineen; lillaahil amru min qablu Wa-mim ba'd; Wa-yawma'izien yafrahul mu'minoon

text: In the victory of Allāh. He gives victory to whom He wills, and He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
tl: Binasril laa; yansuru maien yashaaa'u Wa-Huwal 'Azeezur Raheem

text: [It is] the promise of Allāh. Allāh does not fail in His promise, but most of the people do not know.
tl: Wa'dal laahi laa yukhliful laahu wa'dahoo Wa-laakin-na aksaran naasi laa ya'lamoon

text: They know what is apparent of the worldly life, but they, of the Hereafter, are unaware.
tl: Ya'lamoona zaahiram minal hayaatid dunya Wa-hum 'anil Aakhirati hum ghaafiloon

text: Do they not contemplate within themselves? Allāh has not created the heavens and the earth and what is between them except in truth and for a specified term. And indeed, many of the people, in the meeting with their Lord, are disbelievers.
tl: Awalam yatafakkaroo feee anfusihim; maa khalaqal laahus samaawaati wal-arda Wa-maa bainahumaaa illaa bil-haqqi Wa-ajalim musammaa; Wa-inna kaseeram minan naasi biliqaaa'i Rabbihim lakaafiroon

text: Have they not traveled through the earth and observed how was the end of those before them? They were greater than them in power, and they plowed [or excavated] the earth and built it up more than they [i.e., the Makkans] have built it up, and their messengers came to them with clear evidences. And Allāh would not ever have wronged them, but they were wronging themselves.
tl: Awalam yaseeroo fil ardi fa-yanzuroo kaifa kaana 'aaqibatul lazeena min qablihim; kaanooo ashadda minhhum quwwatanw Wa-asaarul arda Wa-'amaroohaaa aksara mimmaa 'amaroohaa Wa-jaaa'athum Rusuluhum bil-baiyyinaati famaa kaanal laahu liyazli-mahum Wa-laakin kaanooo anfusahum yazlimoon

text: Then the end of those who did evil was the worst [consequence] because they denied the signs of Allāh and used to ridicule them.
tl: Summa kaana 'aaqibatal lazeena asaaa'us sooo-aaa an kazzaboo bi-aayaatil laahi Wa-kaanoo bihaa yastahzi'oon

text: Allāh begins creation; then He will repeat it; then to Him you will be returned.
tl: Allaahu yabda'ul khalqa summa yu'eeduhoo summa ilaihi turja'oon

text: And the Day the Hour appears the criminals will be in despair.
tl: Wa-yawma taqoomus Saa'atu yublisul mujrimoon

text: And there will not be for them among their [alleged] partners any intercessors, and they will [then] be disbelievers in their partners.
tl: Wa-lam yakul lahum min shurakaaa'ihim shufa'aaa'u Wa-kaanoo bishurakaaa'ihim kaafireen

text: And the Day the Hour appears - that Day they will become separated.
tl: Wa-Yawma taqoomus Saa'atu Yawma'izien yatafarraqoon

text: And as for those who had believed and done righteous deeds, they will be in a garden [of Paradise], delighted.
tl: Fa-ammal lazeena aamanoo Wa-'amilus saalihaati fahum fee rawdatien yuhbaroon

text: But as for those who disbelieved and denied Our verses and the meeting of the Hereafter, those will be brought into the punishment [to remain].
tl: Wa-ammal lazeena kafaroo Wa-kazzaboo bi-Aayaatinaa Wa-liqaaa'il Aakhirati faulaaa'ika fil 'azaabi muhdaroon

text: So exalted is Allāh when you reach the evening and when you reach the morning.
tl: Fa-Subhaanal laahi heena tumsoona Wa-heena tusbihoon

text: And to Him is [due all] praise throughout the heavens and the earth. And [exalted is He] at night and when you are at noon.
tl: Wa-lahul hamdu fis samaawaati wal-ardi Wa-'ashiyyanw Wa-heena tuzhiroon

text: He brings the living out of the dead and brings the dead out of the living and brings to life the earth after its lifelessness. And thus will you be brought out.
tl: Yukhrijul haiyya minal maiyyiti Wa-yukhrijul maiyyita minal haiyyi Wa-yuhyil arda ba'da mawtihaa; Wa-kazaalika tukhrajoon

text: And of His signs is that He created you from dust; then, suddenly you were human beings dispersing [throughout the earth].
tl: Wa-min Aayaatiheee an khalaqakum min turaabin summa izaaa antum basharun tantashiroon

text: And of His signs is that He created for you from yourselves mates that you may find tranquility in them; and He placed between you affection and mercy. Indeed in that are signs for a people who give thought.
tl: Wa-min Aayaatiheee an khalaqa lakum min anfusikum azwaajal litaskunooo ilaihaa Wa-ja'ala bainakum mawad-datanw Wa-rahmah; inna fee zaalika la-Aayaatil liqawmien yatafakkaroon

text: And of His signs is the creation of the heavens and the earth and the diversity of your languages and your colors. Indeed in that are signs for those of knowledge.
tl: Wa-min Aayaatihee khalqus samaawaati wal-aardi wakhtilaafu alsinatikum Wa-alwaanikum; inna fee zaalika la-Aayaatil lil'aalimeen

text: And of His signs is your sleep by night and day and your seeking of His bounty. Indeed in that are signs for a people who listen.
tl: Wa-min Aayaatihee manaamukum bil-laili wannahaari wabtighaaa'ukum min fadlih; inna fee zaalika la-Aayaatil liqawmien yasma'oon

text: And of His signs is [that] He shows you the lightning [causing] fear and aspiration, and He sends down rain from the sky by which He brings to life the earth after its lifelessness. Indeed in that are signs for a people who use reason.
tl: Wa-min Aayaatihee yureekumul barqa khawfanw Wa-tama'anw Wa-yunazzilu minas samaaa'i maaa'an fa-yuhyee bihil arda ba'da mawtihaaa inna fee zaalika la-Aayaatil liqawmien ya'qiloon

text: And of His signs is that the heaven and earth stand [i.e., remain] by His command. Then when He calls you with a [single] call from the earth, immediately you will come forth.
tl: Wa-min Aayaatihee an taqoomas samaaa'u wal-ardu bi-amrih; summa izaa da'aakum da'watam minal ardi izaaa antum takhrujoon

text: And to Him belongs whoever is in the heavens and earth. All are to Him devoutly obedient.
tl: Wa-lahoo man fis samaawaati wal-ardi kullul lahoo qaanitoon

text: And it is He who begins creation; then He repeats it, and that is [even] easier for Him. To Him belongs the highest description [i.e., attribute] in the heavens and earth. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
tl: Wa-Huwal lazee yabda'ul khalqa summa yu'eeduhoo Wa-huwa ahwanu 'alaih; Wa-lahul masalul la'laa fis samaawaati wal-ard; Wa-Huwal 'Azeezul Hakeem

text: He presents to you an example from yourselves. Do you have among those whom your right hands possess [i.e., slaves] any partners in what We have provided for you so that you are equal therein [and] would fear them as your fear of one another [within a partnership]? Thus do We detail the verses for a people who use reason.
tl: Daraba lakum masalam min anfusikum hal lakum mimmaa malakat aymaanukum min shurakaaa'a fee maa razaqnaakum fa-antum feehi sawaaa'un takhaafoonahum kakheefa tikum anfusakum; kazaalika nufassilul Aayaati liqawminy ya'qiloon

text: But those who wrong follow their [own] desires without knowledge. Then who can guide one whom Allāh has sent astray? And for them there are no helpers.
tl: Balit taba'al lazeena zalamooo ahwaaa'ahum bighairi 'ilmin famai yahdee man adallal laahu Wa-maa lahum min naasireen

text: So direct your face [i.e., self] toward the religion, inclining to truth. [Adhere to] the fiṭrah of Allāh upon which He has created [all] people. No change should there be in the creation of Allāh. That is the correct religion, but most of the people do not know.
tl: Fa-aqim wajhaka liddeeni Haneefaa; fitratal laahil latee fataran naasa 'alaihaa; laa taabdeela likhalqil laah; zaalikad deenul qaiyimu Wa-laakinna aksaran naasi laa ya'lamoon

text: [Adhere to it], turning in repentance to Him, and fear Him and establish prayer and do not be of those who associate others with Allāh
tl: Muneebeena ilaihi wattaqoohu Wa-aqeemus Salaata Wa-laa takoonoo minal mushrikeen

text: [Or] of those who have divided their religion and become sects, every faction rejoicing in what it has.
tl: Minal lazeena farraqoo deenahum Wa-kaanoo shiya'an kullu hizbim bimaa ladaihim farihoon

text: And when adversity touches the people, they call upon their Lord, turning in repentance to Him. Then when He lets them taste mercy from Him, at once a party of them associate others with their Lord,
tl: Wa-izaa massan naasa durrun da'aw Rabbahum muneebeena ilaihi summa izaaa azaqahum minhu rahmatan izaa fareequm minhum bi-Rabbihim yushrikoon

text: So that they will deny what We have granted them. Then enjoy yourselves, for you are going to know.
tl: Li-yakfuroo bimaaa aatainaahum; fatamatta'oo fasawfa ta'lamoon

text: Or have We sent down to them an authority [i.e., a proof or scripture], and it speaks of what they have been associating with Him?
tl: Am anzalnaa 'alaihim sultaanan fahuwa yatakallamu bimaa kaanoo bihee yushrikoon

text: And when We let the people taste mercy, they rejoice therein, but if evil afflicts them for what their hands have put forth, immediately they despair.
tl: Wa-izaaa azaqnan naasa rahmatan farihoo bihaa Wa-in tusibhum sayyi'atum bimaa qaddamat aydeehim izaa hum yaqnatoon

text: Do they not see that Allāh extends provision for whom He wills and restricts [it]? Indeed in that are signs for a people who believe.
tl: Awalam yaraw annal laaha yabsutur rizqa limaien yashaaa'u Wa-yaqdir; inna fee zaalika la-Aayaatil liqawmien yu'minoon

text: So give the relative his right, as well as the needy and the traveler. That is best for those who desire the face [i.e., approval] of Allāh, and it is they who will be the successful.
tl: Fa-aati zal qurbaa haqqahoo walmiskeena wabnassabeel; zaalika khairul lil lazeena yureedoona Wajhal laahi Wa-ulaaa'ika humul muflihoon

text: And whatever you give for interest [i.e., advantage] to increase within the wealth of people will not increase with Allāh. But what you give in zakāh, desiring the face [i.e., approval] of Allāh - those are the multipliers.
tl: Wa-maaa aataitum mir ribal li-yarbuwa feee amwaalin naasi falaa yarboo 'indal laahi Wa-maaa aataitum min zaakaatin tureedoona wajhal laahi fa-ulaaa'ika humul mud'ifoon

text: Allāh is the one who created you, then provided for you, then will cause you to die, and then will give you life. Are there any of your \"partners\" who does anything of that? Exalted is He and high above what they associate with Him.
tl: Allaahul lazee khalaqa-kum summa razaqakum summa yumeetukum summa yuhyeekum hal min shurakaaa'ikum maien yaf'alu min zaalikum min shai'; Sub-haanahoo Wa-Ta'aalaa 'ammaa yushrikoon

text: Corruption has appeared throughout the land and sea by [reason of] what the hands of people have earned so He [i.e., Allāh] may let them taste part of [the consequence of] what they have done that perhaps they will return [to righteousness].
tl: Zaharal fasaadu fil barri wal-bahri bimaa kasabat aydin naasi li-yuzeeqahum ba'dal lazee 'amiloo la'allahum yarji'oon

text: Say, [O Muḥammad], \"Travel through the land and observe how was the end of those before. Most of them were associators [of others with Allāh].
tl: Qul seeroo fil ardi fanzuroo kaifa kaana 'aaqibatul lazeena min qabl; kaana aksaruhum mushrikeen

text: So direct your face [i.e., self] toward the correct religion before a Day comes from Allāh of which there is no repelling. That Day, they will be divided.
tl: Fa-aqim wajhaka lid-deenil qaiyyimi min qabli aien yaatiya Yawmul laa maradda lahoo minal laahi Yawma'izien yassadda'oon

text: Whoever disbelieves - upon him is [the consequence of] his disbelief. And whoever does righteousness - they are for themselves preparing,
tl: Man kafara fa'alaihi kufruhoo Wa-man 'amila saalihan fali-anfusihim yamhadoon

text: That He may reward those who have believed and done righteous deeds out of His bounty. Indeed, He does not like the disbelievers.
tl: Li-yajziyal lazeena aamanoo Wa-'amilus saalihaati min fadlih; innahoo laa yuhibbul kaafireen

text: And of His signs is that He sends the winds as bringers of good tidings and to let you taste His mercy [i.e., rain] and so the ships may sail at His command and so you may seek of His bounty, and perhaps you will be grateful.
tl: Wa-min Aayaatiheee aien yursilar riyaaha mubashshi-raatinw Wa-li-yuzeeqakum mir rahmatihee Wa-litajriyal fulku bi-amrihee Wa-litabtaghoo min fadlihee Wa-la'allakum tashkuroon

text: And We have already sent messengers before you to their peoples, and they came to them with clear evidences; then We took retribution from those who committed crimes, and incumbent upon Us was support of the believers.
tl: Wa-laqad arsalnaa min qablika Rusulan ilaa qawmihim fajaaa'oohum bil-baiyyinaati fantaqamnaa minal lazeena ajramoo Wa-kaana haqqan 'alainaa nasrul mu'mineen

text: It is Allāh who sends the winds, and they stir the clouds and spread them in the sky however He wills, and He makes them fragments so you see the rain emerge from within them. And when He causes it to fall upon whom He wills of His servants, immediately they rejoice
tl: Allaahul lazee yursilur riyaaha fatuseeru sahaaban fa-yabsutuhoo fis samaaa'i kaifa yashaaa'u Wa-yaj'aluhoo kisafan fataral wadqa yakhruju min khilaalihee fa-izaaa asaaba bihee mai yashaaa'u min 'ibaadiheee izaa hum yastabshiroon

text: Although they were, before it was sent down upon them - before that, in despair.
tl: Wa-in kaanoo min qabli aien yunazzala 'alaihim min qablihee lamubliseen

text: So observe the effects of the mercy of Allāh - how He gives life to the earth after its lifelessness. Indeed, that [same one] will give life to the dead, and He is over all things competent.
tl: Fanzur ilaaa aasaari rahmatil laahi kaifa yuhyil arda ba'da mawtihaa; inna zaalika lamuhyil mawtaa Wa-Huwa 'alaa kulli shai'in Qadeer

text: But if We should send a [bad] wind and they saw [their crops] turned yellow, they would remain thereafter disbelievers.
tl: Wa-la'in arsalnaa reehan fara-awhu musfarral lazalloo mim ba'dihee yakfuroon

text: So indeed, you will not make the dead hear, nor will you make the deaf hear the call when they turn their backs, retreating.
tl: Fa-innaka laa tusmi'ul mawtaa Wa-laa tusmi'us summad du'aaa'a izaa wallaw mudbireen

text: And you cannot guide the blind away from their error. You will only make hear those who believe in Our verses so they are Muslims [in submission to Allāh].
tl: Wa-maa anta bihaadil 'umyi 'an dalaalatihim in tusmi'u illaa maien yuminu bi-aayaatinaa fahum muslimoon

text: Allāh is the one who created you from weakness, then made after weakness strength, then made after strength weakness and white hair. He creates what He wills, and He is the Knowing, the Competent.
tl: Allahul lazee khalaqa-kum min du'fin summa ja'ala mim ba'di du'fin quwwatan summa ja'ala mim ba'di quwwatin du'fanw Wa-shaibah; yakhluqu maa yashaaa'u Wa-Huwal 'Aleemul Qadeer

text: And the Day the Hour appears the criminals will swear they had remained but an hour. Thus they were deluded.
tl: Wa-Yawma taqoomus Saa'atu yuqsimul mujrimoona maa labisoo ghaira saa'ah; kazaalika kaanoo yu'fakoon

text: But those who were given knowledge and faith will say, \"You remained the extent of Allāh's decree until the Day of Resurrection, and this is the Day of Resurrection, but you did not used to know.\"
tl: Wa-qaalal lazeena ootul 'ilma wal-eemaana laqad labistum fee kitaabil laahi ilaa yawmil ba'si fahaazaa yawmul ba'si Wa-laakinnakum kuntum laa ta'lamoon

text: So that Day, their excuse will not benefit those who wronged, nor will they be asked to appease [Allāh].
tl: Fa-Yawma'izil laa yanfa'ul lazeena zalamoo ma'ziratu-hum Wa-laa hum yusta'taboon

text: And We have certainly presented to the people in this Qur’ān from every [kind of] example. But, [O Muḥammad], if you should bring them a sign, the disbelievers will surely say, \"You [believers] are but falsifiers.\"
tl: Wa-laqad darabnaa linnaasi fee haazal Quraani min kulli masal; Wa-la'in ji'tahum bi-aayatil la-yaqoolannal lazeena kafaroo in antum illaa mubtiloon

text: Thus does Allāh seal the hearts of those who do not know.
tl: Kazaalika yatba'ul laahu 'alaa quloobil lazeena laa ya'lamoon

text: So be patient. Indeed, the promise of Allāh is truth. And let them not disquiet you who are not certain [in faith].
tl: Fasbir inna wa'dal laahi haqqunw Wa-laa yastakhif-fannakal lazeena laa yooqinoon
